title: From 2011: Wangari Maathai, Nobel Peace Prize Laureate, Dies at 71
summary_full: A Kenyan environmentalist, she began by paying women a few shillings to plant trees and went on to become the first African woman to win a Nobel Peace Prize.
summary_public: A Kenyan environmentalist, she began by paying women a few shillings to plant trees and went on to become the first African woman to win a Nobel Peace Prize.
